title: realtime — published events
description: Every event implements `ShouldDispatchAfterCommit`. Auth + subscription lifecycle events feed the monitoring dashboards (broadcast health) + audit trail. Presence-join/leave events are HIGH-VOLUME — audit only samples them.

events.name: BroadcastChannelRegistered
events.trigger: New BroadcastChannel row committed via #[AsBroadcastChannel] discovery at boot.

events.name: SubscriptionAuthorized
events.trigger: Reverb broadcasting/auth endpoint issued a signed channel URL for a User.

events.name: SubscriptionRefused
events.trigger: P1 event. Auth callback returned false OR TenantBoundaryEnforcer refused a cross-tenant channel name. Fail-closed.

events.name: SubscriptionDisconnected
events.trigger: WebSocket closed. Fires normally on tab-close / route change. High volume.

events.name: PresenceJoined
events.trigger: User joined a presence channel. High volume — audit sampling only.

events.name: PresenceLeft
events.trigger: User left a presence channel (explicit unsubscribe OR disconnect). High volume.

events.name: PresenceHeartbeat
events.trigger: Periodic heartbeat from a connected client. Refreshes last_heartbeat_at; presence rows are purged 15m after last heartbeat.
